main.description: Curated magazine collection manifest for a site.standard.document. Uses the same record key as the document it extends so both records can be fetched with one predictable pair of GETs.

document.description: AT URI of the site.standard.document record this collection renders.

items.description: Ordered curated articles plus optional per-item notes.

createdAt.description: When the collection manifest was first published.

updatedAt.description: When the collection manifest was last edited.

editorial.description: Optional editorial intro shown ahead of the curated pieces.

body.description: Editorial body as Markpub markdown (legacy plain string accepted on read during migration).

colophon.description: Optional closing credits on the magazine end spread.

body.description: Colophon body as Markpub markdown (legacy plain string accepted on read during migration).

document.description: AT URI of an included site.standard.document.

note.description: Optional Markpub markdown note shown ahead of the piece (legacy plain string accepted on read during migration).
